meaning: adj.缺乏的,不足的,不完善的
examples: Soils are most commonly deficient in nitrogen and phosphorus.
Nitrogen-deficient plants exhibit many of the symptoms just described.
Some soils are notoriously deficient in micro nutrients and are therefore unable to support most plant life.
But the requirements are different, and some say deficient, when it comes to checked bags.
He was emotionally deficient but he knew that what he was doing was wrong, she added.
